TGM
Project Catalog — 2026
Austin, Texas — Residential

Premium finishes,
delivered on budget.

3,700 sq ft residential project. Seven material categories — cabinets, countertops, vanities, tile, fireplace, doors, and lighting — specified, imported, and installed through a single vendor relationship.

3,700 Square Feet
$350K Cost Savings
10 Month Timeline
◈
7 Material Categories Single-vendor specification
◈
Direct from Factory No domestic middlemen
◈
On Schedule 10-month project timeline
◈
$350K Saved vs. domestic wholesale pricing
01
◈ Custom Cabinetry

White oak millwork,
three door styles.

Medium-tone white oak veneer across slim shaker, European flat-panel, and reeded glass doors with brass frames. Solid plywood carcass construction with melamine-lined interiors for a seamless finish. Blum soft-close hardware throughout. Seamless paneled appliances specified as standard.

White Oak Veneer Plywood Box Blum Hardware Soft-Close Paneled Appliances
02
◈ Natural Stone

Taj Mahal & Viola,
slab to hood.

Fluted Taj Mahal quartzite and Viola marble throughout — waterfall island, integrated sinks, and custom mitered edges for a deep, luxurious profile. The material story carries vertically: a custom Taj Mahal vent hood ties kitchen and stone together as one continuous composition.

Taj Mahal Quartzite Viola Marble Waterfall Island Integrated Sinks Custom Hood
03
◈ Bath Vanities

White oak vanities,
built to order.

Custom white oak vanities in both floating and floor-mounted configurations — drawer layouts and internal storage designed per bathroom, not off-the-shelf. Grain-matched faces, soft-close throughout, and finished to coordinate with the project's broader white oak millwork package.

White Oak Floating & Floor Mount Custom Storage Soft-Close
04
◈ Fireplace Surround

Carved Taj Mahal,
kitchen to living room.

Custom carved Taj Mahal quartzite fireplace mantel — sourced from the same material used in the kitchen to create a seamless transition through the open living space. The carving is the detail; nothing else competes.

Taj Mahal Quartzite Custom Carved Material Continuity
05
◈ Interior & Exterior Doors

Iron exterior,
white oak throughout.

Custom gridded iron exterior doors — insulated and energy-rated. Interior doors are solid-core flat-panel white oak veneer with hidden hinges, pre-stained and pre-hung. Matching trim packages included as standard — one order covers every opening.

Iron Exterior Energy Rated White Oak Veneer Hidden Hinges Pre-Hung
06
◈ Lighting Package

Alabaster & Viola,
brass throughout.

Custom alabaster marble fixtures with choice brass finishes — and Viola marble selections that carry the countertop and vanity material story into the lighting. All fixtures are dimmable, specified to create the right ambiance in every room.

Alabaster Marble Viola Marble Brass Finish Dimmable
07
◈ Exterior Package

WPC decking,
iron railing, pine ceiling.

WPC composite decking paired with pre-stained pine tongue-and-groove porch ceilings and custom iron railing — all exterior finish elements coordinated as a single package. Low maintenance, high-performance materials specified for the Texas climate.

WPC Composite Pine T&G Ceiling Custom Iron Railing Pre-Stained

From spec to delivery — handled.
